common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Refactor wildcard Lombok import to explicit import for better code clarity and maintainability.

common/model/src/test/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
Replace List.get(0) on inputs list with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.

common/repository/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.add(int, E) with List.addFirst(E) for inserting at the beginning of a list.

kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.why_exists: List.get(0) is not strictly a compile error in Java 21, but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API introduced in Java 21 to replace index-based access for the first element, often flagged by linters or required by strict migration policies to use new APIs.

object-controller/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the lombok-mapstruct-binding annotation processor dependency to version 0.2.0.

object-controller/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Project Lombok version to a newer release compatible with the updated build environment.
